subject: Fw: Master bathroom
body:
please print and give faxfax to doug schettloe


----- Forwarded Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, February 1, 2008 9:06:20 AM
Subject: Master bathroom

Dear Jeffrey,
This is MY version of a great elegant bathroom. I have yet to do the details and the interior feeling, but I want to know if you want further corrections.I will try to meet with Doug on monday, I have not contacted him yet.
I am giving a Lecture on "contemporary classical architecture", with De Rohan and Myers. J.P.




 


More new features than ever. Check out the new AOL Mail!
